en-US.name: revinder
en-US.description: Adds spoken tasks to revinder_bridge for sync to Apple Reminders.
examplePhrases: Alexa, use revinder to add a task do that one thing
Alexa, use revinder to add a task on Tuesday at 8pm do that one thing
Alexa, use revinder to add a task on Tuesday at 8pm do that one thing with tags home and cottage

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Use the sample utterances to create tasks in revinder_bridge.
